repos.source_file_count_notes: Counted .js/.ts/.py/.java files excluding tests, docs, examples, fixtures, generated files, node_modules, benchmarks, and .git.
repos.qualification_notes: Recent merged PR screen found more than five PRs since 2025-11-07 touching at least two non-generated code files when tests and type files are included.

tasks.title: perf: cache parsed ContentType objects in ContentTypeParser
tasks.task_prompt: Improve Content-Type parsing performance by caching parsed ContentType objects in ContentTypeParser and reusing those parsed objects from request handling and request.mediaType without changing external behavior.

tasks.title: perf: defer ContentType parsing in getSchemaSerializer until needed
tasks.task_prompt: Avoid unnecessary ContentType object creation in getSchemaSerializer by only parsing the response content type for content-type-keyed response schemas, including status-code, fallback, and default lookup paths.

tasks.title: feat: add request.mediaType
tasks.task_prompt: Add a readonly request.mediaType property that exposes the parsed request Content-Type media type, cache the parsed ContentType on the request, and update validation and request handling to reuse the parsed value.

repos.source_file_count_notes: Counted .js/.ts/.py/.java files excluding tests, docs, examples, fixtures, generated files, node_modules, scripts, and .git.
repos.qualification_notes: Recent merged PR screen found more than five PRs since 2025-11-07 touching at least two non-generated Python code files when regression tests are included.

tasks.title: Track session access and modification in SessionMiddleware
tasks.task_prompt: Change SessionMiddleware so it can distinguish session access from mutation, avoid sending Set-Cookie for unchanged sessions, preserve cookie clearing behavior, and add regression coverage for concurrent/read-only session flows.

tasks.title: Enable autoescape by default in Jinja2Templates
tasks.task_prompt: Make Jinja2Templates use Jinja2's select_autoescape default when creating an environment from a template directory, while preserving caller-supplied environments and adding tests for escaping behavior.

tasks.title: Return explicit origin in CORS response when credentials are allowed
tasks.task_prompt: Update CORSMiddleware so simple responses with allow_origins=['*'] and allow_credentials=True echo the explicit request Origin instead of '*', matching preflight behavior and credentialed CORS requirements.

repos.source_file_count_notes: Counted .js/.ts/.py/.java files excluding tests, docs, examples, fixtures, generated files, node_modules, scripts, and .git.
repos.qualification_notes: Recent merged PR screen found more than five PRs since 2025-11-07 touching at least two non-generated Python code files when regression tests are included.

tasks.title: Fix blackd error handling: split SourceASTParseError from ASTSafetyError
tasks.task_prompt: Separate source AST parse failures from Black internal AST safety errors, map source parse failures to 400 responses in blackd, keep internal safety failures as 500 responses, and update tests around formatting equivalence error handling.

tasks.title: Harden blackd browser-facing request handling
tasks.task_prompt: Harden blackd by rejecting browser-originated requests unless allowlisted, enforcing request body limits before executor submission, adding middleware support for those checks, and covering CORS/body-limit behavior with tests.

tasks.title: In stub files, enforce a blank line between a function and a decorated class definition
tasks.task_prompt: Adjust Black's stub-file formatting so a decorated class definition following a function gets the required blank line separation, keep the behavior gated by the relevant style mode, and add a regression case for decorated classes in .pyi files.

repos.source_file_count_notes: Counted .js/.mjs/.cjs/.ts files excluding tests, docs, examples, fixtures, generated files, node_modules, benchmarks, build/dist, and .git.
repos.qualification_notes: Widely used CLI framework. Selected merged PR touches command argument/option source files and regression tests.

tasks.title: Collect variadic
tasks.task_prompt: Fix variadic argument and option collection so repeated variadic values are appended instead of replacing earlier values, and add regression coverage for argument and option parsing.

repos.source_file_count_notes: Counted .js/.mjs/.cjs/.ts files excluding tests, docs, examples, fixtures, generated files, node_modules, benchmarks, build/dist, and .git.
repos.qualification_notes: Widely used Node.js web framework. Selected merged PR changes request negotiation logic and matching unit tests.

tasks.title: fix: enhance req.acceptsCharsets method
tasks.task_prompt: Enhance req.acceptsCharsets handling so charset negotiation works correctly across accepted, missing, and rejected values, and cover the behavior with request charset tests.

repos.source_file_count_notes: Counted .js/.mjs/.cjs/.ts files excluding tests, docs, examples, fixtures, generated files, node_modules, benchmarks, build/dist, and .git.
repos.qualification_notes: Widely used HTTP client. Selected merged PR guards malformed XHR upload progress events and adds helper-level regression tests.

tasks.title: fix(progress): guard malformed XHR upload events
tasks.task_prompt: Guard progress event reduction against malformed XHR upload events so progress callbacks do not produce invalid data, and add regression tests for malformed event inputs.

repos.source_file_count_notes: Counted .py files excluding tests, docs, examples, fixtures, generated files, virtualenvs, benchmarks, build/dist, and .git.
repos.qualification_notes: Widely used Python web framework. Selected merged PR changes automatic OPTIONS handling and corresponding Flask behavior tests.

tasks.title: fix provide_automatic_options override
tasks.task_prompt: Fix provide_automatic_options override handling so route, view, blueprint, and CLI behavior preserve explicit OPTIONS settings, and update the related Flask tests.

repos.source_file_count_notes: Counted .py files excluding tests, docs, examples, fixtures, generated files, virtualenvs, benchmarks, build/dist, and .git.
repos.qualification_notes: Widely used Python HTTP client library. Selected merged PR fixes response chunk reading and adds regression coverage.

tasks.title: Avoid infinite loop in `HTTPResponse.read_chunked` when `amt` is zero
tasks.task_prompt: Avoid an infinite loop when HTTPResponse.read_chunked is called with amt=0, and add regression coverage for zero-length chunked reads.

repos.qualification_notes: Composable CLI toolkit; localized bug-fix PRs with same-PR test additions. Picked for ACG cross-repo evaluation (research pass 2026-05-12).

tasks.title: Fix: Ensure fish completion handles multiline help strings correctly
tasks.task_prompt: Fix fish shell completion so that commands and options with multiline help strings are handled correctly. Currently, multiline help text causes broken or malformed fish completion scripts.

tasks.title: Flush `sys.stderr` when `CliRunner` finalizes
tasks.task_prompt: Fix CliRunner so that data written to stderr without an explicit flush (e.g. using print with flush=False) is properly captured in the test result. Currently, unflushed stderr writes are lost when CliRunner.invoke finishes.

tasks.title: Auto-detect `type=UNPROCESSED` when `flag_value` has non-basic types
tasks.task_prompt: Fix Option initialization so that when flag_value is set to a non-basic type (e.g. an enum), the option's type is automatically set to UNPROCESSED instead of raising a TypeError or mishandling the value during parsing.

repos.qualification_notes: Object serialization & validation library; non-framework domain. Subagent must verify default_branch — likely 'dev' for marshmallow-code.

tasks.title: Fix validate.Email to accept IDNs
tasks.task_prompt: The validate.Email validator accepts some internationalized domain name (IDN) email addresses that should be rejected as invalid. Email addresses with domain labels that start or end with a hyphen (e.g. 'user@-münchen.de', 'user@münchen-.de') are not rejected. Fix the validator so it correctly rejects these malformed IDN email addresses, and add regression tests for the invalid IDN cases.

tasks.title: Fix Constant field with required=True raising ValueError
tasks.task_prompt: Using the Constant field with required=True raises a ValueError unexpectedly. The Constant field should accept required=True without raising an error, since it always provides its constant value. Fix the Constant field initialization so it works correctly with required=True and add regression tests for this case.

tasks.title: Fix Enum field by-name lookup to only return actual members
tasks.task_prompt: The Enum field's by-name lookup incorrectly returns non-member attributes of the enum class (e.g., methods or properties) when looking up enum members by name. Fix the Enum field so that by-name lookup only returns actual enum members, not arbitrary class attributes, and add regression tests for accessing non-member enum attributes.

repos.qualification_notes: pnpm monorepo; target package is packages/zod. Run pnpm install at repo root, then vitest inside packages/zod. Parser auto-appends --reporter=json.

tasks.title: fix(v4): clone Map and Set in shallowClone to prevent shared state
tasks.task_prompt: In v4, Map and Set values returned by defaulted schemas are shared references rather than independent copies. After parsing an object with a defaulted Map or Set field, mutating the returned value affects subsequent parses. Fix shallowClone so each parse returns an independent copy for Map and Set types, and add regression tests.

tasks.title: fix(v4): align .merge() with .extend() refinement semantics
tasks.task_prompt: In v4, calling .merge() on a ZodObject that has refinements (e.g., .refine(), .superRefine()) silently discards those refinements from the merged result, while .extend() preserves them. Align .merge() to preserve refinements the same way .extend() does, and add regression tests.

tasks.title: fix(v4): reject tuple holes before required defaults
tasks.task_prompt: In v4, tuple schemas with optional elements followed by required elements with defaults incorrectly accept inputs that have holes (undefined) before the required default fields, when they should be rejected. Fix the tuple parsing logic to reject such inputs and add regression tests.

repos.qualification_notes: Markdown parser; uses node's built-in test runner. Parser auto-appends --test-reporter=tap. Verify default_branch (markedjs uses 'master').

tasks.title: fix: fix infinite loop for indented code blank line
tasks.task_prompt: The marked lexer enters an infinite loop when parsing certain indented code blocks that contain blank lines with special characters (e.g., a tab followed by a vertical tab). Add a loop-termination guard so that if the remaining source does not shrink between iterations the parser breaks out cleanly and refactor the existing inline infinite-loop error path to reuse the same guard logic.

tasks.title: fix: avoid task checkbox for setext heading text
tasks.task_prompt: The GFM tokenizer incorrectly treats the text portion of a setext heading (e.g., '[ ] heading') as a task list checkbox, producing wrong output. Fix the tokenizer so it only applies the checkbox pattern inside list item paragraphs, not setext heading text, and add unit and spec coverage for the corrected behavior.

tasks.title: fix: avoid race condition in async parallel parse/parseInline with hooks
tasks.task_prompt: When marked is used with async hooks and multiple parallel parse calls share the same Marked instance, they can interfere with each other's state, causing race conditions and incorrect output. Fix the async parallel parse and parseInline paths so each invocation operates on isolated state, and add regression tests for concurrent async hook usage.

repos.qualification_notes: Iterator utility library; PR #1153 is a small localized bug fix with same-PR pytest regression coverage.

tasks.title: Fix empty ranges in numeric_range.__reversed__
tasks.task_prompt: numeric_range currently mishandles reversing empty ranges: calling reversed() on an empty numeric_range should produce no values, but some empty ranges yield unexpected output. Fix the reversed iteration behavior and add regression tests.

repos.qualification_notes: Caching utility library; PR #388 is a small localized descriptor inspection fix with same-PR pytest regression coverage.

tasks.title: Fix #387: Handle obj=None case for inspection in _DescriptorBase
tasks.task_prompt: Class-level inspection of cached methods can fail when descriptor access receives no instance object. Fix descriptor access so inspecting cached methods on the class works correctly and add regression tests.

repos.qualification_notes: URL utility library; PR #335 is a small localized path/base normalization fix with same-PR Vitest regression coverage.

tasks.title: fix(withoutBase): collapse leading slashes
tasks.task_prompt: withoutBase should normalize paths with repeated leading slashes the same way it handles ordinary leading slashes. Currently a path with multiple leading slashes is not stripped consistently against its base. Fix the normalization behavior and add regression tests.
